name: Venka
description: Utilizing a new fighting stance, this Tenno weapon turns fists into claws and enemies into messy piles of meat and scrap metal.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Utilizing a new fighting stance, this Tenno weapon turns fists into claws and enemies into messy piles of meat and scrap metal.

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Gallium
components.description:
Soft metal used in microelectronics and energy weapons.

Location: Mars and Uranus

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.changes: Valkyr Prime, Venka Prime, and Cernos Prime Relics

patchlogs.name: Arbitrations Revisited: Hotfix 25.7.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa being unable to use abilities or melee when using the Venka after casting Peacemaker.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.5.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Venka elemental FX lingering when holstered in the Orbiter.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Hotfix 23.10.2
patchlogs.changes: Restored Venka Prime's 0.75 Melee Combo Multiplier.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Venka Prime not being drawn when spawning with only melee equipped.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: 19.1.0 Ash Revisited
patchlogs.changes: Valkyr Prime, Cernos Prime, and Venka Prime have been added to the Codex and are now linkable in chat.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing equip sound for Venka Prime.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: 19.0.7 - Valkyr Prime
patchlogs.additions: For a limited time, get Valkyr Prime, Venka Prime, and Cernos Prime – PLUS discounted Platinum, Valkyr Prime Avatars, and Exclusive Prime Gear!

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Venka Claws not being visible to Clients when they are the only weapon equipped.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.9.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Tweaked the Venka offsets on all Warframes to address clipping and unappealing placement.
Fixed a number of missing sound effects for the Venka.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.9.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Revised default position on Venka Tenno Claws.

patchlogs.name: 13.9.0 + 13.9.0.1: The Venka
patchlogs.fixes: Introducing the Venka: A Tenno based Claw Weapon capable of rending both flesh and metal alike! Find it today in the market or in the Tenno Research lab!
